actions.value:
When selling crypto, like BTC, the process goes like this:


Use the Sell tab from the bottom navigation panel of your Edge app. Go through the process to create a sell quote -- And from this, you will find the amount to send, and a specific deposit address. Copy the deposit address, and memorize or write down the amount of coins you are selling to them.


Next, you can tap back over to your Wallets tab (bottom-left), click into your BTC wallet, and tap on Send. Here you can click 'Paste' to paste in the deposit address, and then tap to edit the amount, and send over that exact amount of BTC that was printed on the Sell Quote. Once you send it, then you're done with your side of the transaction, and they will begin processing the coins into money for your bank 🙂 


Note: If you have .012345 BTC, then you would only want to create a quote for .0123 and leave some to be able to pay the fees to send the coins over. This makes it hard to perfectly sell all, but you can get very close.

Let me know if you have any more questions on this!

Here you can click 'Paste' to paste in the deposit address, and then tap to edit the amount, and send over that exact amount of BTC that was printed on the Sell Quote. Once you send it, then you're done with your side of the transaction, and they will begin processing the coins into money for your bank 🙂 

Note: If you have .012345 BTC, then you would only want to create a quote for .0123 and leave some to be able to pay the fees to send the coins over. This makes it hard to perfectly sell all, but you can get very close.

Let me know if you have any more questions on this!
